XenotypeDef.label: Necrosapiens
XenotypeDef.description:
It is said that when a soul is denied entry into the nether world, the body resists decay and the spirit lingers, giving rise to what is known as the Necrosapiens.

Neither fully human nor truly inhuman, they do not fear corruption; their bodies hold formidable strength, yet they shun sunlight and think with dull minds. Legends claim that by devouring vast amounts of human flesh, a Necrosapiens may grow ever stronger—until it approaches an immortal state.

Since the rise of aberrant beings, cases of human corpses being deliberately refined into Necrosapiens have occasionally surfaced. The refinement techniques appear so sophisticated that one cannot fathom how many innocents must have fallen victim to such atrocities.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: A life returned from the nether world—its body long dead, yet untouched by decay.
